settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Path variables make the manifest portable across devices; redaction keywords apply on export.
settings.appearance.title: Appearance · Theme
settings.lang.title: Language
settings.termfx.title: Terminal Effects
settings.termfx.desc: Visual effects for “Development → Terminal”. Each toggles independently and applies instantly.
settings.termfx.hacker: Hacker color scheme (green phosphor + glow + near-black background)
settings.termfx.opacityHint: The lower the opacity, the fainter the background code and the clearer the foreground command text.
settings.icons.title: App Icons
settings.icons.desc: For apps without a bundled icon, fetch a high-resolution brand icon online and cache it locally (%LOCALAPPDATA%\WinDeploy\iconcache). Filled in automatically on startup; can also be refreshed manually.
settings.dev.title: Developer Options
settings.dev.toggle: Developer mode (unlock the full software list and professional features)
settings.dev.desc: When off, only the four common categories (Office / Communication, Game Platforms, System Dependencies, Media) are shown. When on, the full software categories (dev toolchains, IDE, AI, databases, etc.) appear, and the left nav unlocks all feature pages under “Development” (Terminal, Service Config, FTP, WSL, System Tweaks, Advanced Tools) as well as Maintenance, Processes, Startup Items and Environment Variables under “System”. Takes effect immediately.
settings.close.title: When closing the main window
settings.close.desc: “Minimize to background” collapses the app to the system tray and keeps it running after the window is closed. Double-click the tray icon to reopen, right-click to exit.
settings.autostart.title: Startup & tray
settings.autostart.bootDesc: Start this app automatically after signing in to Windows (adds a Run entry for the current user, no admin needed).
settings.autostart.tray: Always show a resident system-tray icon
settings.autostart.trayDesc: Keep an icon in the notification area at all times, whether or not the window is minimized. Double-click to bring up the main window, right-click for quick management and exit.
settings.autostart.fail: Failed to set launch at startup: {0}
settings.paths.title: Path Variables
settings.paths.desc: Install root for portable tools; supports %ENV% variables. Changes take effect on next launch.
settings.paths.toolsDir: ToolsDir (portable packages: Node / MinGW / ffmpeg, etc.)
settings.paths.downloadDir: DownloadDir (default download location: installers / portable packages download here; usable as ${DownloadDir})
settings.repo.title: Repository & Downloads
settings.repo.url: Repository URL (used by sync/save and bootstrap)
settings.repo.mirror: Download mirror (optional, speeds up portable packages / winget; leave blank for official sources)
settings.redact.title: Security · Redaction Keywords
settings.redact.desc: On export, values whose key name contains these words are replaced with ***REDACTED*** (built-in tokens/passwords are handled automatically). Separate with commas or spaces.
settings.saved: Saved. Redaction keywords apply immediately; path variables take effect on next launch.
settings.about.title: About
settings.about.checkUpdateTip: Check for new releases on the GitHub repo Tommy131/owo-win-deployer
settings.about.openDataDirTip: Open %LOCALAPPDATA%\WinDeploy in Explorer (contains settings.json, logs\app.log, logs\progress.jsonl)
settings.aboutDev.title: About the Developer
settings.update.upToDate: You are on the latest version v{0}
settings.update.foundBody:
New version v{0} available (current v{1}).

Go to the releases page to download?
